benefits.definition: "Celery lowers inflammation" refers to its ability to reduce the production of inflammatory compounds in the body, such as prostaglandins and cytokines, due to the presence of antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds like apigenin, luteolin, and chicoric acid.

"Celery boosts immunity" refers to its ability to provide essential nutrients, such as vitamin C and antioxidants, that support the immune system's function in fighting off harmful pathogens and reducing inflammation, thereby enhancing the body's natural defenses.

"Celery aids digestion" refers to its ability to help break down food in the stomach and intestines, promote the production of digestive enzymes, and act as a natural laxative, all of which can alleviate symptoms of indigestion and constipation.

"Celery combat oxidation" refers to its ability to reduce or inhibit the oxidation process, typically due to the presence of antioxidant compounds like flavonoids and polyphenols, which can help protect the body's cells from damage caused by free radicals.

"Celery reduces blood pressure" refers to its ability to lower or regulate high blood pressure levels, attributed to the presence of active compounds like pthalides which may help relax and dilate blood vessels, thereby improving overall cardiovascular health.

"Celery improves bone health" refers to its ability to contribute to the maintenance of healthy bones through its high calcium and vitamin K content, which are essential for bone density, strength, and overall skeletal health.

"Celery detoxifies the body" refers to its ability to help remove and flush out harmful toxins from the body, support liver function, and promote overall health through its high water content, antioxidants, and anti-inflammatory properties.

"Celery enhances brain function" refers to its ability to potentially improve memory, reduce inflammation, and provide essential antioxidants and nutrients that may support overall brain health and cognitive function, possibly leading to a reduced risk of neurodegenerative diseases.

"Celery promotes weight loss" refers to its ability to potentially decrease caloric intake and increase satiety due to its low-calorie and high water and fiber content, making it a beneficial food to include in a weight loss plan.

"Celery supports cardiovascular health" refers to its ability to help maintain a healthy heart by reducing blood pressure, lowering cholesterol levels, and preventing inflammation, which can all contribute to improved overall heart function and decreased risk of cardiovascular diseases.
